ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  "image_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags assigned to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding image */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the image shape */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the image */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation of the image */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the image */,
  "stochastic_convexity" REAL /* Stochastic convexity of the image */,
  "isoperimetric_factor" REAL /* Isoperimetric factor of the image */,
  "maximal_indentation_depth" REAL /* Maximal indentation depth of the image */,
  "lobedness" REAL /* Lobedness of the image */,
  "average_intensity" REAL /* Average intensity of the image */,
  "average_contrast" REAL /* Average contrast of the image */,
  "smoothness" REAL /* Smoothness of the image */,
  "third_moment" REAL /* Third moment of the image */,
  "uniformity" REAL /* Uniformity of the image */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the image */,
  "cluster_h" INTEGER /* Cluster H value of the image */,
  "clusters_k" INTEGER /* Number of clusters K in the image */,
  "feature_extraction_method" TEXT /* Method used for feature extraction (e.g., CNN, traditional) */,
  "feature_extraction_date" TEXT /* Date when features were extracted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis log entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., feature extraction, classification) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Landscape, Portrait) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (NULL if top-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image assigned to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the image belongs to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was assigned to the category */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the image to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_assignments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES image_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature set for which statistics are calculated */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the feature across images */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the feature across images */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the feature across images */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the feature across images */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the feature across images */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_statistics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES image_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., CNN, SVM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_model_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image assigned to a machine learning model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was assigned to the model */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the image to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_model_assignments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_model_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_model_assignments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
